title: Device V2 management lifecycle, safety, and cleanup acceptance
releaseGate: Publish after DB-derived import is complete. User confirmed clean teardown: delete all cloned D2LA records, never delete originals, and do not purge import batches.

stories.title: Edit one imported cloned Device V2 record and verify persistence
stories.scope: Edit one `D2LA_*` cloned record in management UI, reload detail/list, and verify the change persisted without touching the original source record. Prefer low-risk fields such as name, labels, metadata, and status.
stories.nonGoals: Do not delete records, do not start collection, and do not edit original real-device records.
acceptance: Captures before/after UI and network evidence.
Records original-code safety check requirement for D2LA-004B.
validation: No code validation required unless files are changed.

stories.title: Verify original DB sample records remain safe
stories.scope: Compare original DB sample records against the pre-import sample snapshot and verify no unintended mutation occurred.
stories.nonGoals: Do not repair data, do not delete records, and do not expose secrets.
acceptance: Any difference is classified as expected, accepted, blocker, or requires manual review.
Confirms no plaintext credentials in evidence.
validation: No code validation required unless files are changed.

stories.title: Delete all imported cloned records and retain import batch evidence
stories.scope: Execute the approved cleanup policy for `D2LA_*` cloned records: exact-code delete every cloned device after evidence is captured, while retaining import batch evidence.
stories.nonGoals: Do not delete original real-device records and do not purge import batches.
acceptance: Writes `cleanup-report.md` with every cloned code and final deletion status.
Verifies every exact cloned code is absent from management list after deletion.
Confirms import batch/task/row evidence is retained and no purge was executed.
If any clone cannot be deleted, records the exact blocker and leaves it as cleanup-blocked.
validation: No code validation required unless files are changed.

stories.title: Capture negative/error and permission launch blockers
stories.scope: Summarize any invalid import row, bad credential-ref, unreachable endpoint, permission, or cleanup blocker found during Batches 002-004.
stories.nonGoals: Do not add broad new negative tests unless already prepared by the matrix.
acceptance: Each blocker is linked to evidence and marked P0/P1/P2.
No blocker is silently converted to pass.
validation: No code validation required unless files are changed.
